markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review performance, align on the 2026 strategy, and discuss the renewal.](https://fathom.video/share/KeRTx1vpgzCLc_7_7VmBg2ZsaqYX1Q8Y?tab=summary&timestamp=667.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Renewal Confirmed:** Vallarta Adventures will renew, driven by strong organic growth (17% click increase) that now compensates for paid media shortfalls.](https://fathom.video/share/KeRTx1vpgzCLc_7_7VmBg2ZsaqYX1Q8Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1055.0)
  - [**2026 Strategy:** The focus shifts from building a content backlog to targeted refreshes of top-performing articles and optimizing destination landing pages.](https://fathom.video/share/KeRTx1vpgzCLc_7_7VmBg2ZsaqYX1Q8Y?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
  - [**New Workflow:** For new tour pages (e.g., Rhythms of the Night), GrowthX will review copy pre-publication to ensure keyword alignment and maximize SEO impact.](https://fathom.video/share/KeRTx1vpgzCLc_7_7VmBg2ZsaqYX1Q8Y?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
  - [**Internal Advocacy:** GrowthX will provide a performance summary to help Vallarta Adventures justify the program's value to leadership, especially for the lower-performing Cancun site.](https://fathom.video/share/KeRTx1vpgzCLc_7_7VmBg2ZsaqYX1Q8Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1196.0)

## Topics

### Performance & Renewal

  - [**Key Metric:** 17% total click increase across all three destinations.](https://fathom.video/share/KeRTx1vpgzCLc_7_7VmBg2ZsaqYX1Q8Y?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
      - [Vallarta drove the most growth.](https://fathom.video/share/KeRTx1vpgzCLc_7_7VmBg2ZsaqYX1Q8Y?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
      - [Cabo and Cancun are recovering from a recent downtrend.](https://fathom.video/share/KeRTx1vpgzCLc_7_7VmBg2ZsaqYX1Q8Y?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
  - [**Renewal Decision:** Vallarta Adventures will renew, citing strong results and a highly efficient, low-effort workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/KeRTx1vpgzCLc_7_7VmBg2ZsaqYX1Q8Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1058.0)
  - [**Internal Advocacy:** Isabel Luna will use performance data to defend the program's value to leadership, especially for Cancun.](https://fathom.video/share/KeRTx1vpgzCLc_7_7VmBg2ZsaqYX1Q8Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1196.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Organic growth is compensating for paid media shortfalls and is a long-term, compounding asset.](https://fathom.video/share/KeRTx1vpgzCLc_7_7VmBg2ZsaqYX1Q8Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1106.0)
      - [**Challenge:** Justifying the cost for Cancun, which has lower sales but shares the expense equally with Vallarta and Cabo.](https://fathom.video/share/KeRTx1vpgzCLc_7_7VmBg2ZsaqYX1Q8Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1212.0)

### 2026 Strategy & Content Plan

  - [**Strategic Shift:** Move from building a content backlog to optimizing existing high-value assets.](https://fathom.video/share/KeRTx1vpgzCLc_7_7VmBg2ZsaqYX1Q8Y?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
  - [**Primary Focus:**](https://fathom.video/share/KeRTx1vpgzCLc_7_7VmBg2ZsaqYX1Q8Y?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
      - [Targeted refreshes of top-performing articles.](https://fathom.video/share/KeRTx1vpgzCLc_7_7VmBg2ZsaqYX1Q8Y?tab=summary&timestamp=762.0)
      - [Optimization of destination landing pages.](https://fathom.video/share/KeRTx1vpgzCLc_7_7VmBg2ZsaqYX1Q8Y?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
  - [**Content Expansion:**](https://fathom.video/share/KeRTx1vpgzCLc_7_7VmBg2ZsaqYX1Q8Y?tab=summary&timestamp=789.0)
      - [Prioritize seasonal content.](https://fathom.video/share/KeRTx1vpgzCLc_7_7VmBg2ZsaqYX1Q8Y?tab=summary&timestamp=789.0)
      - [Create audience-specific guides (e.g., families, couples).](https://fathom.video/share/KeRTx1vpgzCLc_7_7VmBg2ZsaqYX1Q8Y?tab=summary&timestamp=789.0)
      - [Develop occasion-based content (e.g., honeymoons, retreats).](https://fathom.video/share/KeRTx1vpgzCLc_7_7VmBg2ZsaqYX1Q8Y?tab=summary&timestamp=789.0)
  - [**Review Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/KeRTx1vpgzCLc_7_7VmBg2ZsaqYX1Q8Y?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)
      - [**Tour-related content:** Full review required before publication.](https://fathom.video/share/KeRTx1vpgzCLc_7_7VmBg2ZsaqYX1Q8Y?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)
      - [**Non-tour content (e.g., packing lists):** Expedited review post-publication.](https://fathom.video/share/KeRTx1vpgzCLc_7_7VmBg2ZsaqYX1Q8Y?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)

### New Content Workflow & Blockers

  - [**New Tour Page Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/KeRTx1vpgzCLc_7_7VmBg2ZsaqYX1Q8Y?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
      - [**Goal:** Maximize SEO impact for new tour pages (e.g., Rhythms of the Night).](https://fathom.video/share/KeRTx1vpgzCLc_7_7VmBg2ZsaqYX1Q8Y?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
      - [**Process:** Lucero (VA) will share copy with Mariana (GX) *before* publication for keyword research and feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/KeRTx1vpgzCLc_7_7VmBg2ZsaqYX1Q8Y?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)
      - [**Timeline:** Copy for Rhythms of the Night page expected by Tuesday.](https://fathom.video/share/KeRTx1vpgzCLc_7_7VmBg2ZsaqYX1Q8Y?tab=summary&timestamp=530.0)
  - [**Content Generation Blockers:**](https://fathom.video/share/KeRTx1vpgzCLc_7_7VmBg2ZsaqYX1Q8Y?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)
      - [Mariana reported zero articles submitted for publishing this week due to AI generation issues.](https://fathom.video/share/KeRTx1vpgzCLc_7_7VmBg2ZsaqYX1Q8Y?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
      - [**Problem:** The AI is not respecting word count limits (e.g., generating 2,200 words for a 1,400-word request).](https://fathom.video/share/KeRTx1vpgzCLc_7_7VmBg2ZsaqYX1Q8Y?tab=summary&timestamp=63.0)
      - [**Workaround:** Use Claude to edit and shorten articles generated by the primary tool.](https://fathom.video/share/KeRTx1vpgzCLc_7_7VmBg2ZsaqYX1Q8Y?tab=summary&timestamp=75.0)
